description: Practiced handling asynchronous code using Promises and async/await for cleaner syntax and error handling.
Learned how to build reusable UI blocks with functional components and hooks like useState and useEffect.
Explored collections, documents, and CRUD operations in MongoDB using the native driver.
Implemented middleware functions in Express to handle logging, authentication, and error handling.
Created smooth transitions and keyframe animations to enhance user experience.
Practiced creating branches, merging changes, and resolving conflicts in collaborative projects.
